data.name: Yandere Goth BDSM 9
data.detailed_description:
Kuromisa cuddles up to you all night long, making you so excited that you're unable to sleep. Now, in the morning, you're exhausted, while Kuromisa is as rested as always. You have to go to work today, but Kuromisa wants you to stay home instead. Despite the fact that you were planning on going to work today, Kuromisa reveals a secret that shakes your world.

Experience the reveal of Kuromisa, your 261cm tall, yandere, goth, dominatrix girlfriend's secret and why she's so obsessed with you, as well as a lot of intimate and passionate loving.

  • ~2.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 16 Unique character images

  • 21 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
